title: quality judge output
description: Structured-output generation schema for the quality model judge. The label enum mirrors the canonical quality label set in execution/evals/decomposition/annotation.schema.json (pass | needs_revision | blocking_failure) and must not drift; decomposition-quality-judge.test.mjs pins the equivalence. The wrapper additionally validates failure_modes against the versioned failure taxonomy (unknown modes are judge_invalid) and derives the stored score from the label's namespace band, so this schema is the generation-time guardrail, not the contract of record.
